general.title: Calculate Centroid [SPAC] [DMAP]
general.instructions:
Calculate the centroid of bonding box of the cell. \
Please refer to DUET Documentation, GitHub Documentation for further information.

parameters.name: X Centroid Name
parameters.description: Name of column containing X centroid, default XCentroid.

parameters.name: Y Centroid Name
parameters.description: Name of column containing Y centroid, default YCentroid.
